steps.title: Identify the model from the data
steps.content: The graph shows a straight line, so $f$ is a linear function. The initial deposit is the balance at $x=0$ months, which is the $y$-intercept $f(0)$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: Reading the graph, the line crosses the $y$-axis at $y=10$, so $$f(0)=10.$$ The answer is 10.
